en: nobody ever laid eyes on before, strolled into the Maine National Bank. Until that moment,
ko: 아무도 본 적 없는 남자가 메인 내셔널 은행에 들어섰다.

en: he didn't exist, except on paper. He had all the proper ID, driver's license, birth certificate,
ko: 그는 모든 적절한 신분증, 운전면허증, 출생증명서, 사회보장카드를 가지고 있었다.

en: social security card, and the signature was a spot-on match. I must say, I'm sorry to be
abroad. Thank you. I'm sure I will. Here's your cashier's check, sir. Would there be anything
else? Please, could you add this to your outgoing mail? I'd be happy to. Good day, sir. Mr. Stevens
visited nearly a dozen banks in the Portland area that morning. All told, he blew town with
ko: 스티븐스 씨는 그날 아침 포틀랜드 지역의 거의 12개 은행을 방문했다.

en: better than $370,000 of Ward and Norton's money. Severance pay for 19 years. Good morning,
